programme.title: Para tentar salvar Koichi, Josuke vai à casa de Okuyasu Nijimura, mas é atacado por seu irmão, Keicho. Josuke propõe um acordo a Okuyasu, que está ferido.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Josuke e Koichi decidem encontrar o arco e flecha e destruí-lo para impedir que haja mais vítimas. Eles o encontram no sótão, mas escutam um som estranho.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: A caminho da escola de bicicleta, Koichi atropela um gato dentro de um saco. Um homem vê o acidente e chantageia Koichi, exigindo que ele pague pelo enterro do animal.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Josuke e Koichi tentam descobrir se o colega de escola Toshikazu Hazamada está mesmo usando um Stand e encontram um boneco de madeira no armário dele.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: A colega de escola Yukako Yamagishi confessa seu amor por Koichi. Ele fica muito feliz, mas ela acaba indo longe demais.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Koichi tenta fugir, mas é impedido por Yukako e perde a esperança. Quando ela vai até um telefone público, algo inesperado acontece.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Josuke e Okuyasu vão a um novo restaurante italiano que é meio esquisito. Okuyasu acha a água deliciosa, mas seu corpo tem uma reação estranha.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Motoqueiro Fantasma: Espírito de Vingança, (2012, Comic Books and Superheroes)
programme.desc: Nove anos após se transformar no temido Motoqueiro Fantasma, Johnny Blaze se refugia para tentar controlar sua maldição e deixá-la escondida da maioria das pessoas. Ele leva uma vida solitária, até ser obrigado a entrar em ação novamente.

programme.title: Em Nome do Rei: A Última Missão, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um assassino moderno, é contratado para uma tarefa final: sequestrar as filhas de uma Família real européia. As coisas vão à loucura quando descobrimos que ele escolheu voltar à Idade Média e trazer de volta a ordem a um reino no caos.

programme.title: Em Busca do Paraíso, (2020, Adventure)
programme.desc: Forçado fazer uma jornada perigosa, um nobre guerreiro se depara com inúmeras dificuldades, lugares misteriosos, magia e aventura para chegar ao que seria o paraíso distante.

programme.title: As Tartarugas Ninja 2: O Segredo do Ooze, (1993, Adventure)
programme.desc: Tartarugas Ninja buscam novo lar nos esgotos de Nova York e enfrentam o Destruidor, que usa o Ooze para criar capangas. Com ajuda de April, Jordan e Keno, precisam detê-lo.

programme.title: D Artagnan O Quarto Mosqueteiro, (2022, Children)
programme.desc: A mando de seu pai, o jovem d’Artagnan viaja da Gasconha rural para Paris, onde se envolve em uma trama desonesta entre os mosqueteiros do rei e os guardas do cardeal Richelieu.

programme.title: Thor: Deus do Trovão, (2022, Adventure)
programme.desc: O inescrupuloso Loki escapou de Asgard e está à procura de Yggdrasil, a árvore que contém toda a força do universo. Ele planeja destruí-la e replantá-la à sua imagem e semelhança.

programme.title: Em Nome do Rei: A Última Missão, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um assassino moderno, é contratado para uma tarefa final: sequestrar as filhas de uma Família real européia. As coisas vão à loucura quando descobrimos que ele escolheu voltar à Idade Média e trazer de volta a ordem a um reino no caos.

programme.title: Motoqueiro Fantasma: Espírito de Vingança, (2012, Comic Books and Superheroes)
programme.desc: Nove anos após se transformar no temido Motoqueiro Fantasma, Johnny Blaze se refugia para tentar controlar sua maldição e deixá-la escondida da maioria das pessoas. Ele leva uma vida solitária, até ser obrigado a entrar em ação novamente.

programme.title: Expedição Kon-Tiki, (2013, Adventure)
programme.desc: Em 1947, apesar do medo da água e da incapacidade de nadar, Heyerdahl decidiu testar sua teoria. Ele e cinco companheiros navegam do Peru em uma jangada de madeira construída com um design antigo.

programme.title: Missao Quase Impossível, (2010, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. espião Bob Ho assume sua tarefa mais difícil até hoje: cuidar dos três filhos de sua namorada, que não gostaram muito do namorado de sua mãe.

programme.title: O Monge à Prova de Balas, (2020, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Baseado em uma história em quadrinhos "underground", ele conta a história de um monge tibetano imortal -Chow- que se torna o mentor de um jovem menino de rua -Scott-, a quem ele ensina a proteger um velho pergaminho que o monge cuidou durante anos.

programme.title: A Vida de Um Campeão, (2011, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Matt Hamill enfrentou dificuldades antes de se sagrar três vezes campeão de luta livre. Nascido sem a audição, o lutador usou sua deficiência como vantagem e se tornou o primeiro atleta surdo a vencer um campeonato universitário nacional.

programme.title: O Justiceiro, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: Um policial problemático disfarçado deve se infiltrar em uma gangue implacável. Mas as coisas azedam quando outro policial revela seu disfarce e ele rapidamente se vê lutando por sua vida e pela vida de sua família.

programme.title: O Legado do Grande Mestre, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Mantendo-se discreto depois de ter sido derrotado por Ip Man, Cheung Tin Chi mete-se em sarilhos depois de se envolver numa luta com um estrangeiro poderoso.

programme.title: O Vingador Marcial, (2024, Action)
programme.desc: Depois de matar um adversário em uma luta clandestina, um campeão de artes marciais e MMA vê sua vida virar de cabeça para baixo quando uma gangue rival, em busca de vingança, mata sua esposa durante um ataque de vingança.

programme.title: Máscara Negra, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: O sobrevivente de um projeto para criar super soldados deve lutar contra seus ex-companheiros como um herói mascarado.

programme.title: Sangue Oposto, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Dmitri e James, dois poderosos assassinos de elite contratados pelo governo, se reconectam após seu último trabalho no Sudeste Asiático.

programme.title: Ninja, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Casey é um garoto apaixonado pela filosofia ninja, ele o leva ao Japão para estudar Ninjutsu. Sua instrução progride e seu sensei o envia para Nova York para proteger o lendário Yoroi Bitsu, um baú blindado contendo as armas do último Ninja Koga.

programme.title: Kickboxer: A Retaliação, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Kurt Sloan prometeu a si mesmo que não voltaria para a Tailândia, mas alguém o seda e o força a retornar ao país asiático.

programme.title: Olhos de Dragão, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Hong usa sua visão moral e habilidades para lutar e salvar um bairro de traficantes de drogas e policiais corruptos.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot, (1959, Screwball)
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World, (1963, Screwball)
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Casino Royale, (1967, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this spoof, the heads of the allied spy forces call Sir James Bond out of retirement to fight the power of SMERSH.

programme.title: Dead End, (1937, Drama)
programme.desc: The lives of a young man and woman, an infamous gangster, and a group of street kids converge one day in a volatile New York City slum.

programme.title: Hamlet, (1948, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Prince Hamlet struggles over whether or not he should kill his uncle, whom he suspects has murdered his father, the former king.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet, (1968, Romance)
programme.desc: Italian director Franco Zeffirelli stunned the screen world when he cast two young unknowns to portray the star-crossed lovers in Romeo & Juliet, but it was a gamble that resulted in one of the most popular motion pictures of all time.

programme.title: Oliver Twist, (1948, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: In Charles Dickens' classic tale, an orphan wends his way from cruel apprenticeship to den of thieves in search of a true home.

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.desc: Donnie Yen stars as infamous real-life drug kingpin Crippled Ho, who ruthlessly carved out his empire in 1960's Hong Kong.

programme.title: Sakra, (2023, Adventure)
programme.desc: Starring & directed by international action star Donnie Yen—When a respected martial artist is accused of murder, he goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origin story and the unknown enemies working to destroy him.

programme.title: Warriors of the Rainbow: Seediq Bale, (2012, Foreign Action & Adventure)
programme.desc: Between 1895 and 1945, a Japanese colony inhabited Taiwan and subdued the aboriginal tribes who first settled the land. Seediq leader Mouna forged a coalition with other tribal leaders and plotted a rebellion against their Japanese colonial masters.

programme.title: God of War II, (2021, Foreign Action & Adventure)
programme.desc: Lü Bu, general to warlord Dong Zhuo, has blazed a trail of victories on the battlefield. But when a beautiful apprentice arrives claiming to be his long-lost love, he soon realizes that his closest allies may yet be his most dangerous foes.

programme.title: Book Club, (2018, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.desc: A compassionate drama about a young, successful theatre couple in New York City who meet their surrogate mother for the first time and embark on a startling and intimate weekend of surprises and emotional revelations.

programme.title: Get Over It, (2001, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: When a popular high school basketball star gets dumped by his girlfriend, he desperately does anything to get her back. With the help of his best friend's sister, he joins the same school musical as his ex... resulting in an inevitable love triangle.

programme.title: She's The Man, (2006, Screwball)
programme.desc: The laughs are non-stop when Viola, disguised as her twin brother, Sebastian, joins the high school boy's soccer team and helps win the big game while unexpectedly falling for Duke, the hot star forward.

programme.title: Mean Girls, (2004, Screwball)
programme.desc: Cady thinks she understands "survival of the fittest." However, the law of the wild takes a whole new meaning when the homeschooled 15-year-old enters public high school for the first time.

programme.title: Heartbreakers, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: Max and Page are a mother/daughter con team. Max targets wealthy men and marries them. Page then seduces them while Max "catches" her wayward husbands in the act. Then on to the next mark, posing in a variety of guises to keep one step ahead of the law.

programme.title: She's The Man, (2006, Screwball)

programme.title: Zodiac, (2007, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Collateral, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Perfume: The Story of a Murderer, (2006, Thriller)
programme.desc: In 18th-century France lived Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, who was born with a great sense of smell. But as his gift becomes an obsession, he strives to create the most intoxicating perfume in the world by murdering young women to capture their essence.

programme.title: The Trust, (2016, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two corrupt police officers (Nicolas Cage and Elijah Wood) concoct a plan to rob a bank-style vault that belongs to a high-end heroin dealer.

programme.title: Coherence, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In this mind-bending sci-fi thriller, 8 friends at a dinner party start experiencing strange and mysterious events on the night a comet is passing close to Earth. Soon it becomes clear that nothing and no one are what they appear.

programme.title: F/X, (1986, Thriller)
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler, a movie special-effects man, accepts $30,000 from the Justice Department's Witness Relocation Program to stage the fake assassination of a mob figure who has agreed to name names.

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Sugar, (2009, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A gifted pitcher travels from his home in the Dominican Republic to play minor league baseball in the U.S., where he struggles with the new culture and the pressure of knowing that only his success can rescue his family.

programme.title: Downsizing, (2017, Drama)
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, Paul and his wife decide to get small and live large in a luxurious downsized community. With endless possibilities in the tiny world, Paul realizes we are meant for something bigger.

programme.title: Rain Man, (1988, Drama)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as an idealistic young wheeler-dealer whose life is changed forever when he discovers he has an autistic savant older brother (Dustin Hoffman, in a Best Actor Oscar-winning performance).

programme.title: The Zone of Interest, (2023, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The commandant of Auschwitz, Rudolf Höss, and his wife Hedwig, strive to build a dream life for their family in a house and garden next to the camp. A hypnotic and deeply chilling masterpiece from filmmaker Jonathan Glazer (Under the Skin).

programme.title: Downsizing, (2017, Drama)
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, Paul and his wife decide to get small and live large in a luxurious downsized community. With endless possibilities in the tiny world, Paul realizes we are meant for something bigger.

programme.title: Nicholas Nickleby, (2002, Romance)
programme.desc: After Nicholas' father dies and leaves the Familyy penniless, the Nickleby Family moves to London to stay with their Uncle Ralph. Ralph turns abusive and separates the family.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Dances With Wolves, (1990, Adventure)
programme.desc: After encountering and eventually being accepted by a Native American tribe, Dunbar's loyalties are put to the test when the army threatens his new home, forcing him to choose between white America or the natives he now calls his people.

programme.title: Grey Owl, (1999, Western)
programme.desc: The story of the life and work of the Canadian fur trapper-turned-conservationist who claimed to be an aboriginal North American.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under, (1990, Western)
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Posse, (1993, Western)
programme.desc: There's action galore in this off-beat western that features a group of mostly black infantrymen who return from the Spanish-American War with a cache of gold. The men travel to the West where their leader searches for the men who lynched his father.

programme.title: South of Heaven, West of Hell, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: A small-town marshal, tormented by the puzzling conditions that surround him, is forced to confront his demons at an unexpected and untraditional 'family reunion'.

programme.title: Out of Liberty, (2019, Western)
programme.desc: n the winter of 1839, a jailer in Liberty, Missouri, has to watch over the most dangerous men in the state while they await trial. He faces two dangers: the one that comes from the prisoners and the one that lurks behind the walls of the prison.

programme.title: Badland, (2019, Western)
programme.desc: Gunslinging detective Matthias Breecher (Kevin Makely) is hired to track down 3 dangerous Civil War criminals (Trace Adkins, Bruce Dern and Jeff Fahey) and bring them to justice.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure, (1989, Screwball)

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey, (1991, Screwball)
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music, (2020, Comedy)
programme.desc: Yet to fulfill their rock and roll destiny, the stakes are higher than ever for the now middle-aged Bill and Ted who set out on a new adventure when a visitor from the future warns them that only their song can save life as we know it.

programme.title: Small Soldiers, (1998, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Joe Dante directed this satirical action-comedy about talking tech toys accidentally juiced-up with military microchips.

programme.title: Clockstoppers, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A teenager (Jesse Bradford) accidentally activates a wristwatch that allows him to make time stand still.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Labyrinth, (1986, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Nerve, (2016, Thriller)

programme.title: Striking Distance, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Coming from a police family, Tom Hardy ends up fighting his uncle after the murder of his father. Tom believes the killer is another cop and goes on the record with his allegations. Demoted then to river duty, the killer taunts Tom.

programme.title: The Land of Birds is in turmoil due to a specter known as the Cursed Warrior, which is believed to be the ghost of Lord Owashi, the previous feudal lord who died suddenly.

programme.title: Moso, the late feudal lord’s counselor, and Komei, the chief strategist, are at odds with each other. Neji begins to think that the Cursed Warrior is part of a plot…

programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Tenten and Neji have no choice but to listen to Kakashi. He senses that their being followed. Komei has been declared a criminal and is to be executed. The Cursed Warrior appears and snatches Komei away.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Sagi swears to punish Moso himself. Naruto is reminded of Sasuke when he sees Sagi. Neither words nor Naruto's attempts to stop him can deter Sagi from his chosen path of revenge.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: At Moso's mansion, a battle takes place between the Wandering Ninja and a Leaf Ninja. With Chishima's help, Naruto is freed from Moso's genjutsu. Moso then reveals his true form as the leader of the Wandering ninja, Hoki!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Choji and Naruto are craving Ichiraku's special ramen only to find out that they find the shop closed! Teuchi reveals that his daughter has been kidnapped by Ryonin, aka the Ninja Chefs, who is after his secret recipes!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The Demon of the Ocean is wreaking havoc in the Land of the Sea. Anko leads a team consisting of Naruto, Ino, and Shino. It turns out Anko has an unexpected history with the Land of the Sea.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Unable to find Naruto, Anko meets with officials from the Land of the Sea. The ship carrying government funds that they were supposed to guard sets sail the next day!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: As soon as she awakens, Anko begins to remember Demon Island, a place once visited with her former sensei, Orochimaru. Anko reveals the truth behind the disappearances and the secret behind Isaribi's body.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Amachi and his gang begin their attack on the government ship. Naruto and the others escape from Demon Island, but the sight that greets them is the Land of the Sea fleet on the verge of annihilation.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The Hidden Leaf ninja and Amachi battle it out at sea. With Naruto's help, Amachi is defeated, but then a monster appears. Naruto summons Gamabunta in order to defeat the monster.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Kunijiro visits Tsunade and decides to have Naruto guide his boy through one day in the life of a ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: After escaping from the cave, Naruto and the others chase after the Kedouin in order to put a halt to their plot, but the Village Hidden in the Leaves is already under attack.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto discovers Jiraiya is up to no good. Jiraiya claims to be busy getting his manuscript ready before his deadline. Impatient and irritated, Naruto writes his own manuscript for Jiraiya!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Hidden Leaf Village receives a request from the Village Hidden in the Stars to guard a star. The star is actually a meteorite that fell 200 years ago and is said to possess mysterious powers.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and the others investigate the whereabouts of the stolen star. The team suspects that is an inside job because the ninja who took the star used the ninja art, Kujaku, from the Star Village.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Akahoshi, the masked ninja who kidnapped Sumaru, intends to use Sumaru to call out the mysterious ninja who stole the star.

programme.title: The masked ninja and Naruto fall into the depths of the Valley. While tending to Naruto's wounds, the masked ninja tells him the reason for stealing the star.

programme.desc: Naruto

programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: A mysterious being attaches itself to Naruto, while he was training in the forest. Tsunade begins to wonder if it isn't the legendary being known as the "Onbaa."
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and Shino are given a mission to provide security during the Kagetsu family funeral, but they soon realize that the real mission is to help the eldest son carry out the man's unusual last will and testament!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: An ominous black smoke appears over the Land of Greens, and all of sudden Choji and company are attacked by an unidentified Ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: While questioning Yurinoshin and Shun, the Hidden Leaf squad learns the truth about Shun's true identity.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and the others are attacked by Ruiga, the first evil ninja, who can draw water from the earth to use as weapons.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto is again attacked by the second evil ninja, Jiga. Jiga threatens Naruto's life when Hinata rushes in to save Naruto, but Hinata resists the threats and begins to fight!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and Haruna are confronted by Renga. Declaring that he has taken down others before them, he advances on Naruto, ordering him to hand over the princess!

programme.desc: An amusement park of the future caters to any adult fantasy. Lifelike androids carry out your every whim. A fun place, right? Not so, as a reporter and his Girl Friday find out while on a press junket to the newly opened Futureworld...

programme.title: The Amityville Horror, (1979, Horror)
programme.desc: Supposed true story about the Lutzm family whose dream house turns into a nightmare. The unsuspecting new tenants of a house whose previous occupants had been murdered in their sleep.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker battles Zaizen to unlock Sol Tech’s databank and the secrets to his past!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The chilling details of the past are finally revealed as Playmaker continues his battle with Zaizen.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Zaizen has the upper hand, but Playmaker’s looking to make one last play to take him down!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Ai updates Roboppi’s processors on the who, what, where, and why of LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Duelists are mysteriously being logged into LINK VRAINS against their will, and it’s up to Yusaku to find out why!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: When a Ph.D. in DNA challenges Gore to a duel, the prognosis is positively grim!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Can Gore turn his duel around before the doctor of DNA deletes him!
programme.sub-title: To Gore Or Not To Gore

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Blue Angel takes on the mastermind who developed the virus that deletes duelists!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Blue Angel’s looking to Speed Duel her way to victory, but the diabolical doctor she’s battling is set on prescribing a dose of defeat!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: With LINK VRAINS under attack, it’s up to the flashiest duelist ever to save the day – Shima!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The fate of LINK VRAINS hangs in the balance as Playmaker faces off against one of Hanoi’s top lieutenants!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The Hanoi have expanded their reach beyond the boundaries of LINK VRAINS, and Kolter’s chronicling the chaos!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Ghost Gal ventures into the vast underbelly of LINK VRAINS and uncovers a sinister secret the Hanoi have been hiding!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Ghost Gal puts her data on the line when she Speed Duels against Varis in the sewers of LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The Hanoi’s greatest weapon is about to be unleashed unless Yusaku can link into the VRAINS and stop it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: As Blue Angel's biggest fan, Spectre knows all her dueling tricks and techniques - which makes him the fiercest foe she's ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Spectre knows Blue Angel's entire life story, and he’s going to give it a sad ending!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker must cut down Spectre’s defenses if he is to topple the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Spectre stoops to a new low when he reveals a game changer that leaves Playmaker without a play to make!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Varis reflects on the past as he prepares for a future without LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Making a comeback is what Gore does best, but will his finisher be enough to vanquish Varis?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker’s life points are on the verge of elimination - along with any hopes of stopping Varis and the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Varis reveals his true identity – as well as the terrifying truth behind the Ignis!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Time’s running out as Playmaker has less than one hour before all of LINK VRAINS is destroyed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The Tower of Hanoi is nearly complete – leaving Varis a win away from deleting LINK VRAINS once and for all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Varis is on the verge of victory unless Playmaker can make one last play to stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: With bounty hunters hot on his trail, Playmaker faces new challenges and enemies in a revamped LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker's Speed Duel takes a turn for the worse when his opponent transforms into an even more dangerous duelist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: A new duelist brings the heat to LINK VRAINS - Soulburner!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker and Soulburner discover a common link to their past – The Lost Incident!

programme.title: By the time Kin'emon and the others notice that Yasuie is trying to sacrifice his life to save their raid plan, it was all too late. Ebisu Town's people laughing out loud annoys Zoro, but when Hiyori tells him the reason behind it, he is in for a shock!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro's Fury! The Truth About the Smile!

programme.title: Hiyori and Shinobu tearfully tell the Straw Hats the truth behind Ebisu Town residents' cheerfulness and smiles, which infuriates them. When Yasuie's daughter, Toko, runs to her father's body, Orochi recognizes who she is and takes a shot at her!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Zoro and Sanji start fighting against Orochi's clan. Nami and the rest of the Straw Hats join them. Meanwhile, at the Excavation Labor Camp, a new criminal, Hitokiri Kamazo, has arrived.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Straw Hats Step In! An Uproarious Deadly Battle at the Execution Ground!

programme.title: Zoro keeps fighting Kyoshiro, but Orochi's Oniwabanshu comes to back Kyoshiro up. Meanwhile, at the Excavation Labor Camp, Queen announces the restart of the Sumo Inferno with a new cruel rule.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy's Determination! Win Through the Sumo Inferno!

programme.title: Kin'emon apologizes Ashura Doji AKA Shutenmaru for goading Holdem to attack Atamayama where Ashura's hideout was located, and asks him to join the fight against Kaido. Meanwhile, Chopper and his group finally arrived at the Excavation Labor Camp!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Storm Has Come! A Raging Big Mom!

programme.title: Craving red-bean soup, Big Mom attacks Queen, the Animal Kingdom Pirates' Lead Performer who reins over Udon. However, when she finds out that the pot is empty, she turns her wrath against the one who ate it all: Luffy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Grudge Over Red-bean Soup! Luffy Gets into a Desperate Situation!

programme.title: After finding out that Luffy ate the whole pot ofthe red-bean soup that she was looking for, Big Mom becomes infuriated and goesafter him. Meanwhile, Queen, the Lead Performer, comes up with a plan to stopthe rampaging Big Mom.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Stop the Emperor of the Sea! Queen's Secret Plan!

programme.title: Queen hastily ties up the sleeping Big Mom and carries her to Onigashima leaving Udon to Babanuki. Babanuki uses a weapon that Queen made to threaten inmates and make them catch Luffy, but a mysterious figure emerges from the forbidden cell to save Luffy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Brutal Ammunition! The Plague Rounds Aim at Luffy!

programme.title: Kawamatsu the Kappa is freed and stands up against Babanuki and his underlings! Listening to Old Man Hyo's suggestion, Raizo and Kiku reveal their true identities which give the desperate prisoners not only a shock but also some hope.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Start Fighting Back! Luffy and the Akazaya Samurai!

programme.title: Luffy faces those who are infected by the Plague Rounds and the non-infected prisoners who submit to the authority of Udon. To open their eyes, Luffy takes a measure that will risk his life. However, the Chief Warden Babanuki has something up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: We’re Here to Win! Luffy's Desperate Scream!

programme.title: The freed prisoners in Udon refuse to fight alongside Luffy because he is a pirate. Raizo and Old Man Hyo try their best to convince them, but an unexpected person stands up to bring the prisoners hope after taking down Kaido!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Warriors' Dream! Luffy's Conquer of Udon!

programme.title: After standing against Orochi, Zoro and Hiyori are chased by Orochi's ninja group. Meanwhile, Orochi is told that they captured Trafalgar Law as the people of the Flower Capital prepare for the upcoming Fire Festival.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Orochi's Hunting Party! The Ninja Group vs. Zoro!

programme.title: Nami and Franky join Kanjuro who has taken Yasuie's dead body to bury him with Oden, and together they hit the road. Robin, Usopp, and Brook are at the dock trying to figure out a way to pass through a check point.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tension Rises in Onigashima! Two Emperors of the Sea Meet?!

programme.title: As the clash between Kaido and Big Mom continues, Queen looks for a way to get out of Onigashima. Meanwhile in Udon, Old Man Hyo finds his former allies, four bosses from each region.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hiyori's Confession! A Reunion at Bandit's Bridge!

programme.title: Zoro runs after the warrior-monk who took his Shusui and Kawamatsu shares with Hiyori his memory of a fox that was guarding the graves in Ringo. As they catch up to Zoro, they find a room filled with swords.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Its Name is Enma! Oden's Great Swords!

programme.title: As the day of the raid approaches, Law finds someone who might help him escape the prison and Kin'emon gathers up most of his main allies to discuss the raid plan. Meanwhile, at Onigashima, Kaido and Big Mom make a stunning declaration!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A New Alliance?! Kaido’s Army Gathers!

programme.title: Kin'emon, Momonosuke, and the others can't fight back tears when they hear that Hiyori is alive. Zoro is stunned by Enma's demonic power and its ties to him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ticking Down to the Great Battle! The Straw Hats Go into Combat Mode!

programme.title: The resolution that passed the Reverie and the incidents surrounding the conference stun people all over the world and corner the Seven Warlords of the Sea. Meanwhile, a Navy captain Koby secretly contacts someone who is currently in the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big News! An Incident That Will Affect the Seven Warlords!

programme.title: Admiral Issho and Fleet Admiral Sakazuki argue over the abolition of the Seven Warlord system and the alliance of the two Emperors of the Sea. Meanwhile, ex-Fleet Admiral Sengoku teaches the young Navy soldiers about the legendary Rocks Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Legendary Battle! Garp and Roger!

programme.title: On the day of the Fire Festival, Orochi leaves the mainland of the Land of Wano heading for Onigashima where a big banquet will take place.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rendezvous Port! The Land of Wano Act Three Begins!

programme.title: The night before the great battle, Orochi orders the destruction of the Sunny along with some bridges across the country to block Akazaya samurai's allies from their rendezvous.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Number-One Samurai in the Land of Wano! Here comes Kozuki Oden!

programme.title: When the angry mountain god, the giant boar, almost kills Kin'emon, Oden steps in. Kin'emon is impressed when he sees Oden's strength and pledges his life to serve him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tearfully Swearing Allegiance! Oden and Kin'emon!

programme.title: Oden transforms the wild land of Kuri into a habitable region and is made Daimyo over it. Then he meets Kawamatsu the Kappa and the two Minks, Dogstorm and Cat Viper, who become his followers like the others.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Changing Destiny! The Whitebeard Pirates Cast Ashore!

programme.title: Whitebeard and his crew dock at one of the ports in the Land of Wano with their broken ship and the news excites Oden. He runs to the port and asks Whitebeard to let him get on board the ship but the request is rejected.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Oden's journey finally begins. He is in awe of all the things that he has never seen before. And for the first time in his life, he becomes a wanted person and makes the headlines which catches the eye of a high-profile figure.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Whitebeard's Little Brother! Oden's Great Adventure!

programme.title: In the Land of Wano, the Shogun Sukiyaki falls critically ill and names Orochi proxy Shogun until Oden returns in case he dies.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Roger is amazed when he finds out that Oden can read the script on the Ponegliff since he believes it will guide him to the last, undiscovered island where no man has ever been.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Singing out loud, the Roger Pirates continue on with their journey. They soar up to the island above the clouds and go down into the deep sea to get to the island at the sea bottom.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Oden and the Roger Pirates head for the Land of Wano to obtain a copy of the Road Ponegliff. Oden sees Kin'emon and the others for the first time in years, but he immediately returns to the sea leaving his wife and children behind.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Pirates is Born! Arriving at the Last Island!

programme.title: After reaching Laugh Tale, Roger declares the disbanding of his pirate group and disembarks first. Oden gets dropped off at the Land of Wano and reunites with his family and retainers.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To the Land of Wano! The Roger Pirates Disband!

programme.title: Enraged by Orochi's tyrannical acts, Oden raids his castle in the Flower Capital and points his sword at Orochi. However, hours later, people who were waiting for Oden to come out after defeating Orochi see the unexpected.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sad News! The Opening of the Great Pirate Era!

programme.title: Oden keeps dancing naked in the Flower Capital and losing all the trust of the people. One day, Orochi comes to Kuri and reveals his evil plan for the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Raid! Oden and the Akazaya Nine!

programme.title: Kaido comes to the mainland along with his troops to fight against Oden and the Akazaya samurai who were on their way to raid Kaido's mansion. Even though Oden's group are unprepared and outnumbered, they fight hard to save the future of the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The End of the Battle! Oden vs. Kaido!

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Ex Machina, (2015, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A young programmer (Domhnall Gleeson) at an internet company is chosen by a reclusive CEO (Oscar Isaac) to evaluate the capabilities and consciousness of a beautiful and sophisticated robot (Alicia Vikander).

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Species, (1995, Science fiction)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: The Host, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter, (1971, Drama)
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun, (1967, Drama)
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Man With The Gun, (1955, Drama)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain, (1938, Drama)
programme.desc: Rancher Gene Autry and his pal Frog Millhouse come to the aid of ranchers and townfolk who are swindled by fake mining promoters into buying parcels of a ghost town with the promise of electricity from the nearby Boulder Dam.

programme.title: The Old Barn Dance, (1938, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Frog Millhouse are horse traders who run into trouble when an unscrupulous tractor company starts selling the modern machines to farmers.

programme.title: Blue Montana Skies, (1939, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry heads North to apprehend fur smugglers plundering the trappers' pelts, and then return to the U.S. When the trail leads to the H-H dude ranch owned by a beautiful gal, the action heats up.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite, (1972, Drama)
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: El Paso, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: A lawyer finds that guns speak louder than words when he rids a Western town of its criminal element.

programme.title: Fort Yuma, (1955, Drama)
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: The Mexican, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.

programme.title: Sahara, (2005, Adventure)
programme.desc: Two thrill-seeking adventurers cross paths with a beautiful doctor and they find themselves on the ultimate hunt for a treasure that claims all who seek it.

programme.title: 3000 Miles to Graceland, (2001, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: The Brothers Bloom, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: The con is on when two swindlers (Adrien Brody, Mark Ruffalo) make an heiress (Rachel Weisz) the target of their next scheme.

programme.title: 3000 Miles to Graceland, (2001, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: The Mexican, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.

programme.title: Daryl and Dog get captured by the Reapers; they are taken to the Meridian and reconnect with a familiar figure from their past.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd; Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully; Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa’s school is having a sports day. However, one of its main events is jumping over the vaulting box, which Chibi-Usa is not very good at.
programme.sub-title: Overcome Your Fear: The Jump to Freedom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of Your Dreams: The Mirror of Truth

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.
programme.sub-title: Pegasus's Secret: The Boy Who Protects the Dream World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.
programme.sub-title: Dream to be an Adult: The Amazoness' Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Motion: The Dark Queen's Evil Hand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.
programme.sub-title: The Source of Darkness: Dead Moon Circus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.
programme.sub-title: Labyrinth of Mirrors: Chibi Moon Captured

programme.title: O Céu Pode Esperar, (1978)
programme.desc: 1978. Warren Beatty é um jogador de futebol que sofre um acidente e vai para o céu. Lá, descobre-se que ele era a pessoa errada. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Warren Beatty, Julie Christie, James Mason, Dyan Cannon, Charles Grodin, Jack Warden, Buck Henry, Vincent Gardenia, Joseph Maher, Hamilton Camp Diretor: Buck Henry, Warren Beatty

programme.title: Dreamgirls: Em Busca de um Sonho, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Com performances espetaculares de um elenco de estrelas, Dreamgirls faz enorme sucesso com a história incrível de três cantoras que aprendem que tudo é possível quando você segue os seus sonhos. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Jamie Foxx, Beyonce Knowles, Eddie Murphy, Jennifer Hudson, Danny Glover, Anika Noni Rose, Keith Robinson, Sharon Leal, Hinton Battle, John Lithgow Diretor: Bill Condon

programme.title: E Se... Você Tivesse Uma Segunda Chance?, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Há 15 anos, Ben Walker deixou sua namorada, sua cidade e seu ministério por uma oportunidade de negócios. Agora ele tem uma sólida carreira e uma noiva. Um dia ele é visitado por um anjo que mostra como seria sua vida se ele tivesse seguido seu chamado. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Kevin Sorbo, Kristy Swanson, John Ratzenberger Diretor: Dallas Jenkins

programme.title: Poder Além da Vida, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Dan Millman é um atleta que tem dinheiro, mulheres perseguindo-o e aptidões para participar das Olimpíadas. Mas um encontro com Sócrates, um homem que questiona tudo, faz sua visão de mundo mudar completamente. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Scott Mechlowicz, Nick Nolte, Amy Smart, Tim DeKay, Ashton Holmes, Paul Wesley, Agnes Bruckner, B.J. Britt, Tom Tarantini, Beatrice Rosen Diretor: Victor Salva

programme.title: In Bloom, (2024)
programme.desc: 2024. A antologia de curtas-metragens "Florescendo" representa cinco culturas distintas e as mulheres que delas emergem, cada uma enfrentando um perigo diferente da feminilidade, mas também conectadas através da irmandade universal. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Yasmina El-Abd, Mazel Sunil Vyas, Vanessa Giacomo, Brendah Wairimu Ngato, Folu Storms Diretor: Omolola “Lowla Dee” Adeleke, Giuliana Monteiro, Voline Ogutu, Priyanka Banerjee, Nicole Teeny

programme.title: Martinho Lutero, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Veja os principais locais da vida de Lutero, Eisleben sua cidade natal; Erfurt onde atuou no mosteiro; Worms, cenário da famosa dieta; Castelo de Wartburg onde foi prisioneiro e Wittenberg, onde realizou maior parte de seus trabalhos. Gêneros: Faith & Spirituality

programme.title: Dreamgirls: Em Busca de um Sonho, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Com performances espetaculares de um elenco de estrelas, Dreamgirls faz enorme sucesso com a história incrível de três cantoras que aprendem que tudo é possível quando você segue os seus sonhos. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Jamie Foxx, Beyonce Knowles, Eddie Murphy, Jennifer Hudson, Danny Glover, Anika Noni Rose, Keith Robinson, Sharon Leal, Hinton Battle, John Lithgow Diretor: Bill Condon

programme.title: Os Três Desejos, (1995)
programme.desc: 1995. Após atropelar um homem acidentalmente, a mulher convida a vítima a recuperar-se da perna quebrada em sua casa. É lá que ele tentará realizar os desejos dessa alma tão caridosa. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Patrick Swayze, Antonio Mastrantonio, Joseph Mazzello, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio, Seth Mumy, David Marshall Grant, Jay O. Sanders, Michael O'Keefe, John Diehl, Diane Venora Diretor: Martha Coolidge

programme.title: À Procura da Liberdade, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Dois homens separados por 100 anos estão unidos em sua busca pela liberdade. Em 1856, um escravo, Samuel Woodward e sua família, escapam da Plantação Monroe perto de Richmond, Virgínia. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Cuba Gooding Jr., Sharon Leal, David Rasche Diretor: Peter Cousens

programme.title: O Poder do Perdão, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. O Pai de Kathleen a abandonou há mais de 30 anos na Véspera de Natal. Ela se recusa, de todas as maneiras, a celebrar o Natal. Quando fica face-a-face com as dores do passado, deve escolher entre viver uma vida de perdão ou ter dor o resto da vida. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Anthony Tyler Quinn, Cameron Tem Napel, Muse Watson Diretor: Tracy J. Trost

programme.title: Quando Hitler Roubou o Coelho Cor-de-Rosa, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Uma família judia tem que fugir do nazismo. Saindo de Berlim, eles fogem para Zurique e, de lá, para Paris e, finalmente, para Londres. Tudo isso é narrado através da perspectiva de uma criança. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Riva Krymalowski, Marinus Hohmann, Carla Juri Diretor: Caroline Link

programme.title: O Que Fazer?, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Henry Altmann, zangado como sempre, acorda com uma dor de cabeça terrível. Uma nova médica, Sharon Gill, irá vê-lo. Quando Sharon conhece Henry, ele a repreende até que, exasperada, ela diz a ele que provavelmente ele tem apenas 90 minutos de vida. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Robin Williams, Mila Kunis, Peter Dinklage Diretor: Phil Alden Robinson

programme.title: Rodada Final, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Enquanto tenta recomeçar em Nova Iorque, um antigo pugilista é manipulado para voltar ao ringue para uma última luta. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Gary Dourdan, James Tumminia, Bashar Rahal Diretor: Niki Iliev

programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais se tornam vítimas de uma gangue. Os policiais são brutalmente assassinados e um jovem é designado para ajudá-lo, mas a gangue volta a agir, iniciando uma aventura cheia de ação e vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Fugindo do Passado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ao ser confundido com agente da CIA envolvido com o roubo de um experimento militar, Dean Cage é contaminado com uma droga que causa alucinações. Sua namorada, a detetive Amy Knight, tem apenas seis horas para encontrar o antídoto e salvar sua vida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Cordeiros e Carrascos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um advogado resolve trabalhar no caso de um guarda de prisão da África do Sul que se traumatizou pelas execuções em que participou. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Cobrador de Dívidas 2, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois cobradores de dívidas se envolvem em uma situação extremamente perigosa ao aceitarem a missão de recuperar um dinheiro roubado. Para isso, devem perseguir bandidos e fugir de um traficante vingativo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Terra Sem Lei, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A outrora pacífica cidade fronteiriça de Garlow é agora o covil do maligno Dutch Albert e seu bando. O agente funerário Patrick Tate agora se vê dividido entre seguir acobertando as vítimas do bando ou enfrentar os criminosos de uma vez por todas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Sabor de Uma Paixão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Abandonada pelo namorado em Tóquio, uma mulher aprende a ser chef de cozinha. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Agente Mirim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quando sua mãe viaja, Olívia fica sob os cuidados do seu irmão mais velho, Miles. Quando Olivia testemunha um sequestro, ninguém acredita nela, nem mesmo seu irmão. Determinada a provar seu valor, a pequena decide investigar o crime por si só. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Você Acredita?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um pastor é questionado por um morador de rua sobre sua crença em Deus, e passa a usar essa pergunta com seus fiéis também. A partir daí, doze histórias diferentes se cruzam, cada uma com sua provação sobre até onde vai a fé em Deus. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um conto de fadas contemporâneo sobre o surgimento de uma amizade improvável entre uma jovem solitária que sonha ser autora de livros infantis e um viúvo rabugento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Trumbo - Lista Negra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Autor de algumas das histórias de maior sucesso da época, Dalton Trumbo foi preso e proibido de trabalhar. Mesmo quando saiu da prisão, demorou anos para vencer o boicote do governo, sofrendo com problemas envolvendo familiares e amigos próximos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Guerra Biológica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Wesley McLaren é um imunologista aposentado da CIA, que leva uma vida tranquila com sua filha em uma fazenda em Montana. Quando uma arma biológica é acionada espalhando um vírus letal, ele se vê forçado a criar uma vacina. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Se Encontrar Sartana, Reze pela sua Morte, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. O lendário herói Sartana é chamado para investigar uma série de roubos e assassinatos, que levam a consequências surpreendentes. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Gianni Garko, William Berger, Sydney Chaplin, Gianni Rizzo, Fernando Sancho, Klaus Kinski, Andrea Scotti, Carlo Tamberlani, Franco Pesce, Heidi Fischer Diretor: Gianfranco Parolini

programme.title: O Retorno de Frank James, (1940)
programme.desc: 1940. Frank James deixou sua vida de crimes e se tornou um pacífico fazendeiro. Nem quando Clem Tom Grayson, um jovem e grande amigo, lhe conta que Jesse James foi baleado pelas costas pelos irmãos Ford, Frank procura se vingar, pois crê na justiça. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Eddie Collins, Gene Tierney, Henry Fonda, Henry Hull, J. Edward Bromberg, Jackie Cooper, John Carradine, Lloyd Corrigan Diretor: Fritz Lang

programme.title: O Céu Mandou Alguém, (1948)
programme.desc: 1948. Após mais um assalto, três ladrões de banco fogem rumo ao deserto. Perseguidos pelo xerife Buck Sweet, eles encontram uma mulher no meio do nada. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Ben Johnson, Charles Halton, Guy Kibbee, John Wayne, Mae Marsh, Mildred Natwick, Pedro Armendáriz, Ward Bond Diretor: John Ford

programme.title: Os Abutres Têm Fome, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Nesta aventura desenfreada e anárquica que se desenrola no México do século XIX, o mercenário americano Hogan salva a freira Sara dos seus pretensos molestadores. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Ada Carrasco, Alberto Morin, Armando Silvestre, Clint Eastwood, David Povall, Enrique Lucero, Manolo Fábregas, Shirley Maclaine Diretor: Don Siegel

programme.title: Shalako, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. Shalako está conduzindo uma expedição de caça em uma zona selvagem no Novo México. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Brigitte Bardot, Eric Sykes, Honor Blackman, Jack Hawkins, Peter Van Eyck, Sean Connery, Stephen Boyd, Woody Strode Diretor: Edward Dmytryk

programme.title: Meu Nome è Ninguém, (1975)
programme.desc: 1975. O honesto advogado Black Jack Gideon envolve-se na procura de um valioso e raro pônei japonês, que foi sequestrado, e por quem o bando de desertores renegados exige uma fabulosa quantia de resgate. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Cris Huerta, Eli Wallach, Giuliano Gemma, Lorenzo Robledo, Manuel De Blas, Tito García, Tomas Milian, Víctor Israel Diretor: Sergio Corbucci

programme.title: Raça Brava, (1980)
programme.desc: 1980. No Velho Oeste Bill Tyler, um comerciante de peles, tenta achar com seu melhor amigo, Henry Frapp, o lendário vale conhecido pela enorme quantidade de animais para caçar. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Charlton Heston, Brian Keith, Victoria Racimo, Stephen Macht, Seymour Cassel, John Glover, William Lucking, Victor Jory Diretor: Richard Lang

programme.title: Com a Corda no Pescoço, (1978)
programme.desc: 1978. Condenado à forca, Henry Moon é capturado enquanto tentava fugir para o México, mas descobre que existe uma lei local que perdoa os crimes de quem se casa com uma mulher solteira ou viúva. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Christopher Lloyd, Danny Devito, Jack Nicholson, John Belushi, Mary Steenburgen, Richard Bradford, Tracey Walter, Veronica Cartwright, Jeff Morris, Danny DeVito Diretor: Jack Nicholson

programme.title: O Voo da Águia, (1979)
programme.desc: 1979. Pike, Martin Sheen, é um jovem forasteiro da cidade que se vê preso e perdido em meio ao deserto oeste selvagem quando o seu amigo e caçador de peles morre. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Claudio Brook, Harvey Keitel, John Castle, Jorge Luke, Jorge Russek, Martin Sheen, Sam Waterston, Stéphane Audran Diretor: Anthony Harvey

programme.title: Que Assim Seja, Trinity, (1974)
programme.desc: 1974. Um aventureiro protege um garoto que herdou um terreno sob o qual há um rico campo de petróleo. O menino é ameaçado por vilões perigosos que querem prejudicá-lo e tomar a terra. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Bud Spencer, Jack Palance, Francisco Rabal Diretor: Maurizio Lucidi

programme.title: O Preço de um Covarde, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. Um excelente drama sobre crime, punição e justiça à moda do faroeste. NO velho oeste americano duas personalidades colidem em Val Verde, Texas, quando os irmãos Bishop, têm que juntar suas forças para a escapar de uma sentença de morte. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Andrew Prine, Clint Ritchie, Dean Martin, Denver Pyle, George Kennedy, James Stewart, Raquel Welch, Will Geer Diretor: Andrew V. Mclaglen

programme.title: Quando Explode a Vingança, (1971)
programme.desc: 1971. Juan Miranda é um camponês rude com coração de Robin Hood. Sean Mallory é um revolucionário irlandês que é especialista em dinamite e vive agora no México. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Antoine Saint John, Franco Graziosi, James Coburn, Maria Monti, Rik Battaglia, Rod Steiger, Romolo Valli, Vivienne Chandler Diretor: Sergio Leone

programme.title: Ataque do Tubarão Mutante, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Quando um navio do Semestre no Mar é afundado por um tubarão de duas cabeças, os sobreviventes fogem para um atol deserto. Mas quando começa a inundar, os aliados não estão mais a salvo das mandíbulas duplas do monstro. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Brooke Hogan, Carmen Electra, Charlie O'Connell, Christina Bach Norman, Cornne Nobili, David Gallegos Diretor: Christopher Douglas-Olen Ray

programme.title: Apocalipse Zumbi, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Meses depois que uma praga de zumbis exterminou 90% da população americana, um pequeno grupo de sobreviventes abre caminho pelo país em busca de um refúgio na ilha de Catalina. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Ving Rhames, Taryn Manning, Lesley-Ann Brandt, Johnny Pacar, Eddie Steeples, Gary Weeks, Anya Monzikova, Gerald Webb, Lilan Bowden, Robert Blanche Diretor: Nick Lyon

programme.title: Batalha dos Zumbis, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Alguns anos depois do caos econômico na Croácia, o mundo mudou e agora a água é rara e valiosa, e uma epidemia zumbi assola a Europa. O bon vivant Mico finalmente conhece sua estrela de cinema favorita, mas eles terão que lutar juntos para sobreviver. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Krešimir Mikic, Hristina Popovic, Tihana Lazovic, Dado Cosic, Dušan Bucan, Marina Redzepovic, Bojan Navojec, Nikša Butijer, Sergej Trifunovic, Severin... Diretor: Predrag Licina

programme.title: A Invasão Zumbi, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Quando zumbis tomam conta de São Francisco, um grupo desesperado sobrevive trancando-se dentro da prisão de Alcatraz. Quando os mortos-vivos violam a ilha, nossos heróis são forçados a retornar ao continente invadido pelos mortos-vivos. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Danny Trejo, Mariel Hemingway, Ethan Suplee, Heather Hemmens, Chad Lindberg, Levar Burton, French Stuart Diretor: Nick Lyon

programme.title: Velocipastor, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Depois de perder seus pais, um padre viaja para a China, onde herda uma habilidade misteriosa que lhe permite se tornar um dinossauro. Horrorizado com esse novo poder, uma prostituta o convence a usá-lo para combater o crime. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Gregory James Cohan, Alyssa Kempinski, Aurelio Voltaire, Daniel Steere, Jesse Turits, Jiechang Yang Diretor: Brendan Steere

programme.title: A Maldição do Titanic, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. 110 anos após um dos maiores desastres da história, Titanic III faz sua viagem inaugural até os destroços do navio original. Mas forças sombrias das profundezas do oceano aterrorizam os tripulantes e ameaçam repetir a história. programme.title: Castelo de Ouija, (2024)
programme.desc: 2024. A vida da Princesa Thalia mergulha no caos após a morte de seu pai. A Rainha Velma a mergulha em um sono profundo para assumir o reino, mas suas ações levam a consequências imprevistas. programme.title: Circus Kane - O Circo dos Horrores, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Um grupo é convidado para um misterioso jogo em uma casa de horrores, sob a promessa de um prêmio de 250,000 dólares para aquele que sobreviver. programme.title: Necrotério, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Uma brincadeira de estudantes universitários se torna mortal quando descobrem que um diretor de funerária pode ter sido libertado de um manicômio um pouco cedo demais. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Dan Byrd, Denise Crosby, Alexandra Adi Diretor: Tobe Hooper

programme.title: American Poltergeist - Possuídos, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Ted e Lauren alugam uma velha casa no campo, de um homem chamado Jim, para trabalhar em seu estudo. À medida que o tempo passa, o casal se torna cada vez mais desconfiado dos acontecimentos e do estranho comportamento de seu anfitrião. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Justin Arnold, Andrea Nelson, Don Scribner, Michael Phillip Edwards, Jack Hunter, Carolyn Ratteray, Jonathan Brooks Diretor: Susannah O Brien

programme.title: Sexta-Feira 13 - Parte 5: Um Novo Começo, (1985)
programme.desc: 1985. Desta vez, ele parece estar de olho nos pacientes mais jovens de um abrigo isolado. E não são poucos os jovens que aparecem aos pedaços, como mais um trabalho de Jason. programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.desc: 2014. Um assassino moderno, é contratado para uma tarefa final: sequestrar as filhas de uma Família real européia. programme.title: 2001. É um episódio de South Park especial dedicado ao Butters para encerrar a temporada. programme.title: 2002. Já que Butters parece encaixar tão bem com Cartman, Kyle e Stan, seus pais decidem ir com eles para passar um final de semana em Aspen.
